news.title: Elon Musk’s SpaceX Plans $55 Billion Investment to Make A.I. Chips
news.snippet: The rocket company’s new semiconductor factory, called Terafab, is part of the billionaire’s increasing efforts to dominate artificial intelligence.

news.title: Elon Musk’s Confidante Shivon Zilis Is Cast as His Inside Source at OpenAI
news.snippet: Shivon Zilis worked closely with Elon Musk while she was on OpenAI’s board. Her ties to the world’s richest man were detailed in a landmark trial on Wednesday.

news.title: Anthropic’s C.E.O. Says It Could Grow by 80 Times This Year
news.snippet: The chief executive, Dario Amodei, said the rapid growth had exponentially increased the start-up’s need for more computing power.

news.title: Elon Musk Wanted OpenAI to Go Commercial, Greg Brockman Testifies
news.snippet: Greg Brockman, OpenAI’s president, testified in a trial pitting Mr. Musk against his company that the world’s richest man was eager to change how it operated as a nonprofit.

news.title: Apple Reaches $250 Million Settlement Over Claims It Misled People on A.I.
news.snippet: Some iPhone owners will be eligible to receive $25 to $95 over claims that the tech giant oversold its artificial intelligence system, Apple Intelligence.

news.title: Coinbase Lays Off 14% of Employees as A.I. Changes Work
news.snippet: The largest U.S. crypto exchange said it was cutting jobs because of cryptocurrency market volatility and to “optimize” for the artificial intelligence era.

news.title: S.E.C. Settles Lawsuit Against Elon Musk Over His Twitter Disclosures
news.snippet: The agency, which has been pulling back on lawsuits against major companies, ended a case that had accused Mr. Musk of hiding his purchases of Twitter stock. He agreed to pay $1.5 million.

news.title: Elon Musk’s Lawyers Ask OpenAI’s President Why He Is Worth $30 Billion
news.snippet: The legal team implied in a federal trial that Greg Brockman, OpenAI’s president and co-founder, was driven by greed rather than building safe A.I.

news.title: White House Considers Vetting A.I. Models Before They Are Released
news.snippet: The Trump administration, which took a noninterventionist approach to artificial intelligence, is now discussing imposing oversight on A.I. models before they are made publicly available.

news.title: Instagram privacy tech is turned off today- what does this mean for your DMs?
news.snippet: The platform said it would remove end-to-end encrypted messages, a major U‑turn by parent company Meta.

news.title: Meta brings High Court challenge over Ofcom fees
news.snippet: Meta said Ofcom's calculations were "disproportionate"; the regulator said it would defend its position.

news.title: Former OpenAI board member says Elon Musk offered her sperm donations
news.snippet: Shivon Zilis is the mother of four of Musk's children. That relationship began as she advised OpenAI.

news.title: Robot wars - what an operation in Ukraine tells us about the battlefield of the near future
news.snippet: After Ukraine's President Zelensky said territory had been captured using just robots and drones, what is the future of unmanned warfare?

news.title: 'I thought he was going to hit me,' OpenAI co-founder says of Musk
news.snippet: OpenAI president Greg Brockman spoke during the second week of a month-long trial between Elon Musk and OpenAI's Sam Altman.

news.title: Apple to pay up to $95 to some US iPhone buyers over AI lawsuit
news.snippet: Claims from last year said the tech firm’s advertising of Apple Intelligence fooled iPhone buyers.

news.title: US to safety test new AI models from Google, Microsoft, xAI
news.snippet: New agreements between the companies and the Commerce department build on Biden-era pacts.

news.title: Pornhub to become accessible again for some UK users
news.snippet: UK iPhone users who have completed Apple's device-based age checks will no longer be blocked from the site's adult content.

news.title: Oscars says AI actors and writing cannot win awards
news.snippet: The academy that controls the Oscars on Friday issued new award eligibility requirements around the use of artificial intelligence in film.

news.title: Pentagon says US military to be an 'AI-first' fighting force
news.snippet: The US military has agreed eight new contracts with big tech firms as it expands its artificial intelligence capabilities.

news.title: Tech Life
news.snippet: Workers train AI to identify everyday objects by labelling items in photos and videos.

news.title: Musk v. Altman Evidence Shows What Microsoft Executives Thought of OpenAI
news.snippet: Leaders at the tech giant were skeptical of OpenAI—but wary of pushing it into the arms of Amazon, according to emails dating back to 2018.

news.title: Trump Pivots on AI Regulation, Worker Ousted by DOGE Runs for Office, and Hantavirus Explained
news.snippet: Today on Uncanny Valley, we’re diving into recent reports that the Trump administration is considering an executive order that would establish some sort of federal oversight over new AI models.

news.title: How to Disable Google's Gemini in Chrome
news.snippet: Chrome users were caught off guard by a 4-GB Google AI model baked into Chrome, sparking privacy concerns. The good news: You can easily uninstall it. The bad? You might not want to.

news.title: ChatGPT Has ‘Goblin’ Mania in the US. In China It Will ‘Catch You Steadily’
news.snippet: OpenAI’s chatbot has some weird linguistic tics in Chinese that are driving users crazy.

news.title: One of DOGE’s Young Engineers Is Now Running a Defense Tech Startup
news.snippet: In an email viewed by WIRED, Ethan Shaotran describes Blitz Industries as “a defense company backed by big names.”

news.title: Google Is Rebranding the Fitbit App to ‘Google Health’
news.snippet: Google is sunsetting Google Fit by year’s end. While Fitbit remains very much alive, the rebranded Google Health app is your one-stop shop for all things health and fitness.

news.title: Google Ditches the Screen With the New Fitbit Air (2026)
news.snippet: Powered by Gemini and designed around simplicity, the new Fitbit Air could finally give the screenless fitness tracker market a compelling alternative to Whoop.

news.title: Thousands of Vibe-Coded Apps Expose Corporate and Personal Data on the Open Web
news.snippet: Companies like Lovable, Base44, Replit, and Netlify use AI to let anyone build a web app in seconds—and in thousands of cases, spill highly sensitive data onto the public internet.

news.title: Ramp in talks to hit $40B+ valuation, 6 months after reaching $32B
news.snippet: The company is reportedly in talks to raise another $750 million at a pre-money valuation of more than $40 billion. It last raised in November at $32 billion.

news.title: OpenAI launches new voice intelligence features in its API
news.snippet: The new features could be handy for customer service systems, but OpenAI says they have applications that work across a variety of other fields, including education and creator platforms.

news.title: Kodiak AI raises $100M at a steep discount, sending its stock tumbling 37%
news.snippet: The company made a series of other announcements during earnings, including a new commercial contract, a pilot program in Canada, and a collaboration.

news.title: Voi founders’ new AI startup Pit has become the latest rising star out of Stockholm
news.snippet: AI startup Pit is led by the co-founders of European scooter giant Voi and backed by a16z, which is leading the startup’s $16 million seed round.

news.title: Hackers deface school login pages after claiming another Instructure hack
news.snippet: The cybercrime group ShinyHunters claimed to have hacked Instructure again, defacing the login pages of several Instructure customer schools with an extortion message.

news.title: OpenAI introduces new ‘Trusted Contact’ safeguard for cases of possible self-harm
news.snippet: The company is expanding its efforts to protect ChatGPT users in cases where conversations may turn to self-harm.

news.title: Perplexity’s Personal Computer is now available to everyone on Mac

news.title: Could Lovable’s automatic 10% pay raise be the cure for toxic cultures?
news.snippet: Stockholm-based vibe-coding platform Lovable is offering employees an automatic 10% raise as a way to sidestep classic corporate politics.

作者｜黄楠 周鑫雨

news.title: 我所知道的胡峥楠
news.snippet: 2024年的初夏，小米SU7的爆单与偶发的几起事故，将这家初出茅庐的造车新势力拉入了冰火两重天的舆论场。在新技术的冲击面前，有人感叹诺基亚式的倾覆就在眼前，但真正的局内人眼里，却浮现出另一番光景。当一些狂热的粉丝在社交网络上对着传统车企疯狂输出时，雷军却在牌桌底下，做着最务实、甚至是最传统的算计。这个算计的核心，叫胡峥楠。2026年4月，胡峥楠成为小

news.title: 美团：“五一”小城服务消费走热  中低线城市休闲玩乐订单增长70%
news.snippet: “下了飞机直奔洗头店，缅式洗头体验，洗出了全国人气。”被称为“东南亚风情平替”的云南芒市，在“五一”假期，迎来四面八方的游客，当地特色体验“缅式洗头”成为不少游客的打卡项目。从边境小城的民族风情体验，到县域目的地的亲子DIY、洗浴休闲和本地美食，小城服务消费正在释放新的增长活力。5月6日，美团发布“五一”假期休闲玩乐消费趋势。美团数据显示，假期期间，中低线城市休闲玩乐订单环比增

news.title: 蚂蚁阿福启动“健康中国体检关怀行动”，为1亿人免费解读体检报告
news.snippet: 春季是传统的体检季，可很多人拿到体检报告却犯了难。一项5000名网友参与的调研显示，80%的受访者表示体检报告没有得到详细讲解，也不知道检后该怎么做；75%的受访者没有按体检报告的建议进行复查。为解决这一普遍痛点，5月6日，国内最大的AI健康应用蚂蚁阿福启动“健康中国体检关怀行动”，为1亿人免费解读体检报告。用户打开阿福App拍照或上传体检报告，即可获得实时、免费、

news.title: 独家丨腾讯云成立云产品六部，王慧星担任负责人
news.snippet: 雷峰网消息，腾讯云发布一则内部信，将成立云产品六部，负责构建AI原生的代码（CodeBuddy）与泛生产力智能体（WorkBuddy），推进系列智能体产品的能力建设与商业化。腾讯副总裁、腾讯云CTO王慧星兼任云产品六部负责人，向CSIG总裁汤道生汇报；刘毅担任云产品六部助理总经理，向王慧星汇报。此前，腾讯云产研一共有五大产品部，产品一部主要负责IaaS相关产品，以及数据库、消息
